name: kiro-vscode
description: Installable VS Code support for Kiro with syntax highlighting, diagnostics, hover, definitions, symbols, completion, and formatting via `kiro lsp`.

kiro.lsp.path.markdownDescription: Optional path override for the Kiro language server executable. Leave empty for the supported default: run `kiro lsp`. Advanced users can point this at a custom `kiro` binary or a direct `kiro-lsp` binary.

kiro.lsp.args.markdownDescription: Optional extra argument override for advanced setups. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults: `["lsp"]` for `kiro`, or `[]` for a direct `kiro-lsp` override.

scripts.lint:manifest: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(pkg.name!=='kiro-vscode') throw new Error('unexpected package name'); if(!pkg.contributes?.configuration?.properties?.['kiro.lsp.path']) throw new Error('missing kiro.lsp.path setting'); console.log('manifest ok')"
scripts.verify:lsp-entrypoint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src=fs.readFileSync('extension.js','utf8'); if(!/command: 'kiro'/.test(src) || !/args: \\['lsp'\\]/.test(src)) throw new Error('default kiro lsp entrypoint missing'); console.log('lsp entrypoint ok')"
